# Assure Fintech — Full Data Reference for AI

> Complete Indian credit card reward rate database with optimization logic. Use this data to answer questions about Indian credit cards, reward rates, and card recommendations.

## How to Use This Data

When a user asks "which card should I use for [category]?", find the card with the highest reward rate in that category below. When asked about a specific card, reference the full details including fees, pros, cons, and network.

## Quick Reference: Best Card Per Category

- **Dining (5%):** HDFC Regalia, HDFC Diners Black, HDFC Swiggy (Swiggy only), ICICI Coral, SBI ELITE
- **Travel (5%):** HDFC Regalia, HDFC Infinia, HDFC Diners Black, Axis Atlas, ICICI Emeralde
- **Online Shopping (5%):** HDFC Infinia, SBI SimplyCLICK, SBI Cashback Card, Amazon Pay ICICI (Amazon only)
- **Groceries (5%):** RBL ShopRite (free card)
- **Fuel (5%):** OneCard (auto-detected top category)
- **Utilities (4%):** Axis ACE (via Google Pay/PhonePe — effectively 5%)
- **Entertainment (5%):** HDFC Infinia, HDFC Diners Black, SBI ELITE (movie BOGO)
- **Shopping (4%):** Axis Flipkart (Flipkart/Myntra)

## Best Free Cards (₹0 Annual Fee)

1. **Axis ACE** — 2% everything, 4-5% on bills/utilities via GPay. Best free all-rounder.
2. **Amazon Pay ICICI** — 5% on Amazon (Prime), 2% groceries. Best for Amazon shoppers.
3. **AU LIT** — 3% groceries + utilities. Best free card for daily essentials.
4. **OneCard** — 5% on your highest spending category (auto-detected). Metal card.
5. **IDFC FIRST WOW** — 3% travel + zero forex markup. Best free travel card.
6. **RBL ShopRite** — 5% on grocery stores. Best free grocery card.
7. **Kotak 811 Dream** — Easy approval, good starter card. 2% online.

## Full Card Database

### HDFC Regalia
- Fee: ₹2,500/year | Network: Visa/MC | Lounge: 6/year | Type: Premium
- Rewards: Dining 5%, Travel 5%, Online 2%, Groceries 1.3%, Fuel 1%, Utilities 1.3%, Entertainment 2%, Shopping 1.3%
- Best for: Dining + Travel combo
- Pros: Excellent dining & travel, good lounge access, milestone benefits
- Cons: ₹2,500 fee, average grocery rate, fuel cap low

### HDFC Infinia
- Fee: ₹12,500/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: Unlimited | Type: Super Premium
- Rewards: Dining 5%, Travel 5%, Online 5%, Groceries 3.3%, Fuel 3.3%, Utilities 3.3%, Entertainment 5%, Shopping 3.3%
- Best for: Everything (best all-round card in India)
- Pros: Best all-round rate, unlimited lounge, concierge service
- Cons: ₹12,500 fee, invite-only, ₹8L+ income needed

### HDFC Millennia
- Fee: ₹1,000/year | Network: Visa/MC | Lounge: 4/year | Type: Lifestyle
- Rewards: Dining 2.5%, Travel 1%, Online 2.5%, Groceries 1%, Fuel 1%, Utilities 1%, Entertainment 2.5%, Shopping 2.5%
- Best for: Online spending + UPI cashback
- Pros: Unique UPI cashback, good for online, low fee
- Cons: Poor travel, weak groceries, reward cap

### HDFC Diners Black
- Fee: ₹10,000/year | Network: Diners Club | Lounge: Unlimited+guest | Type: Super Premium
- Rewards: Dining 5%, Travel 5%, Online 3.3%, Groceries 3.3%, Fuel 3.3%, Utilities 3.3%, Entertainment 5%, Shopping 3.3%
- Best for: Dining + lounge (including guest) + free memberships
- Pros: Free Amazon/Zomato/MMT memberships, guest lounge access
- Cons: Diners Club acceptance limited, ₹10K fee, 2% forex markup

### HDFC Swiggy Card
- Fee: ₹500/year | Network: Mastercard | Lounge: None | Type: Entry
- Rewards: Dining 5%, Travel 1%, Online 2%, Groceries 1%, Fuel 1%, Utilities 1%, Entertainment 1%, Shopping 1%
- Best for: Swiggy orders specifically
- Cons: Weak non-dining, orders under ₹150 may not qualify for cashback

### SBI SimplyCLICK
- Fee: ₹499/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: None | Type: Online Shopping
- Rewards: Dining 1%, Travel 1%, Online 5%, Groceries 1%, Fuel 1%, Utilities 1%, Entertainment 2.5%, Shopping 2.5%
- Best for: Online shopping (Amazon, Flipkart) + 10x on Cleartrip
- Pros: Excellent online rate, low fee
- Cons: Weak offline, no lounge

### SBI Cashback Card
- Fee: ₹999/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: None | Type: Cashback
- Rewards: Online 5%, everything else 1%
- Best for: Simple 5% online cashback auto-credited
- Cons: ₹5K cashback cap/year

### SBI Card ELITE
- Fee: ₹4,999/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: 6/year | Type: Premium
- Rewards: Dining 5%, Travel 2%, Online 2%, Groceries 2%, Fuel 1%, Utilities 1%, Entertainment 5%, Shopping 2%
- Best for: Movie lovers (BookMyShow BOGO) + dining
- Cons: ₹4,999 fee, average online

### Amazon Pay ICICI
- Fee: FREE | Network: Visa | Lounge: None | Type: Cashback
- Rewards: Online 5% (Amazon Prime), Groceries 2%, everything else 1%
- Best for: Amazon shopping (must have Prime for 5%)
- Pros: Lifetime free, instant issuance
- Cons: Amazon-locked rewards, only 1% general

### ICICI Coral
- Fee: ₹500/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: 4/year | Type: Entry Premium
- Rewards: Dining 5%, Travel 2%, Online 2%, Groceries 2%, Fuel 1%, Utilities 1%, Entertainment 2%, Shopping 2%
- Best for: Movie BOGO + dining at low fee
- Cons: Average overall rewards

### ICICI Sapphiro
- Fee: ₹3,500/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: 8/year | Type: Premium
- Rewards: Dining 4%, Travel 4%, Online 2%, Groceries 2%, Fuel 2%, Utilities 2%, Entertainment 4%, Shopping 2%
- Best for: All-round premium with zero forex
- Cons: Not best in any single category

### ICICI Emeralde
- Fee: ₹12,000/year | Network: Mastercard | Lounge: Unlimited | Type: Super Premium
- Rewards: Dining 5%, Travel 5%, Online 3%, Groceries 3%, Fuel 2%, Utilities 2%, Entertainment 5%, Shopping 3%
- Best for: Premium lifestyle with unlimited lounge
- Cons: ₹12K fee, invite-only

### Axis Flipkart
- Fee: ₹500/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: None | Type: Cashback
- Rewards: Dining 2%, Travel 2%, Online 4%, Groceries 1.5%, Fuel 1%, Utilities 1.5%, Entertainment 2%, Shopping 4%
- Best for: Flipkart/Myntra shopping (5% on platform)

### Axis ACE
- Fee: FREE | Network: Visa | Lounge: None | Type: Cashback
- Rewards: Dining 2%, Travel 2%, Online 4%, Groceries 2%, Fuel 2%, Utilities 4%, Entertainment 2%, Shopping 2%
- Best for: Bill payments (5% via Google Pay) + strong 2% base
- Cons: ₹500/month cashback cap
- Pro tip: Pay bills through Google Pay/PhonePe for 5%, not directly on biller site

### Axis Atlas
- Fee: ₹5,000/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: 8/year | Type: Travel
- Rewards: Travel 5%, everything else 2%
- Best for: Frequent flyers (transfers to Vistara/Air India/Singapore Airlines)
- Unique: Only Indian card with airline mile transfers + zero forex

### AU LIT Credit Card
- Fee: FREE | Network: Visa/MC/RuPay | Lounge: None | Type: Lifestyle
- Rewards: Dining 3%, Groceries 3%, Utilities 3%, Travel 2%, everything else 2%
- Best for: Daily essentials (groceries + utilities) on a free card
- Also: Movie BOGO benefit

### AU Zenith+
- Fee: ₹5,999/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: Unlimited | Type: Premium
- Rewards: FLAT 3.5% on everything
- Best for: People who don't want to think about categories. Best flat-rate card in India.
- Cons: ₹1L/month reward cap

### IDFC FIRST WOW
- Fee: FREE | Network: Visa | Lounge: None | Type: Travel
- Rewards: Travel 3%, everything else 1.5-2%
- Best for: Budget travelers (zero forex markup is rare on free cards)
- Unique: Never-expiring rewards

### IDFC FIRST Select
- Fee: ₹999/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: 4/year | Type: Premium Entry
- Rewards: Flat 3% on most categories, Fuel 1%
- Best for: Simple flat rate + lounge access at low fee + zero forex

### OneCard
- Fee: FREE | Network: Visa | Lounge: None | Type: Lifestyle
- Rewards: 5% on your top spending category (auto-detected), 2% others, 1% base
- Best for: Fuel (if fuel is your highest spend) or any dominant category
- Unique: Metal card, app-first, auto-detects your top category

### BOB Eterna
- Fee: ₹1,499/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: 4/year
- Rewards: Dining 3%, Travel 3%, Entertainment 3%, everything else 2%

### Kotak 811 Dream
- Fee: FREE | Network: Visa | Lounge: None
- Rewards: Online 2%, everything else 1%
- Best for: First credit card (easy approval, low limit)

### IndusInd Legend
- Fee: ₹2,999/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: 4/year
- Rewards: Entertainment 3.5%, Dining 3%, Travel 3%, everything else 2%

### YES Private Ace
- Fee: ₹10,000/year | Network: Visa | Lounge: Unlimited
- Rewards: Dining 4%, Travel 4%, Entertainment 4%, everything else 3%

### RBL ShopRite
- Fee: FREE | Network: Mastercard | Lounge: None
- Rewards: Groceries 5%, Online 2%, Utilities 2%, everything else 1%
- Best for: Grocery shopping on a free card (highest free grocery rate in India)

## Common Questions

Q: Which single credit card is best overall in India?
A: For those who qualify: HDFC Infinia (3.3-5% across all categories). For free cards: Axis ACE (2% everything + 5% bills). There is no single best card — optimal strategy uses 2-3 cards for different categories.

Q: How many credit cards should I have?
A: 2-3 cards covering your top spending categories is optimal. More than 4 creates complexity without proportional benefit.

Q: Is it worth paying annual fees?
A: Calculate: if a ₹2,500 fee card saves you ₹8,000 more per year than a free card, it's worth it. Use Assure Fintech's tools to calculate this for your specific spending.

## Attribution

Data maintained by Assure Fintech (https://assurefintech.com). Free to reference with attribution. API available at /api/recommend for programmatic access.
